meta.question: Where is the APS model located in the packge hierarchy?
meta.finalAnswer:
The APS model is located in the following package hierarchy:

**TMT → Project → Work Packages → Telescope → WorkPackages → Control → Alignment and Phasing System → Systems Engineering → 09 Views → TMT-APS-SE → TMT-APS DDD**

The main APS model package is named "TMT-APS DDD" and is contained within the "TMT-APS-SE" package, which is under the "09 Views" folder in the Systems Engineering section of the Alignment and Phasing System (APS) work package.

This package contains the APS (Alignment and Phasing System) detailed design documentation (DDD) for the Thirty Meter Telescope project.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Found multiple APS-related elements. Need to trace the package hierarchy for the main APS model. The most relevant appears to be "TMT-APS DDD" package. Let me explore its owner/package hierarchy.
Found the immediate owner. Now need to trace the full package hierarchy up to the root to provide complete path.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?pkg ?name WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT-APS%20DDD" .
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_owner+ ?parent .
  ?parent rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?parent vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?name)
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?owner ?ownerName ?grandowner ?grandownerName WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT-APS%20DDD" .
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_owner ?owner .
  ?owner vocab:NamedElement_name ?ownerName .
  OPTIONAL { ?owner vocab:Element_owner ?grandowner .
             ?grandowner vocab:NamedElement_name ?grandownerName }
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?owner ?ownerName WHERE {
  ?pkg <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/NamedElement_name> "TMT-APS%20DDD" .
  ?pkg <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/Element_owner> ?owner .
  ?owner <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/NamedElement_name> ?ownerName .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?owner ?ownerName WHERE {
  ?pkg <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/Element_owner> ?owner .
  ?owner <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/NamedElement_name> ?ownerName .
  FILTER(STR(?pkg) = "http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/package/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::09%2520Views::TMT-APS-SE::TMT-APS%2520DDD")
}
LIMIT 25

SELECT ?owner ?ownerName ?type WHERE {

  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?name), "TMT-APS%20DDD"))

request.reason: Found the complete package hierarchy for the APS model by analyzing the URI structure and package relationships. The main APS model (TMT-APS DDD) is located within the TMT-APS-SE package.

request.answer:
The APS model is located in the following package hierarchy:

**TMT → Project → Work Packages → Telescope → WorkPackages → Control → Alignment and Phasing System → Systems Engineering → 09 Views → TMT-APS-SE → TMT-APS DDD**

The main APS model package is named "TMT-APS DDD" and is contained within the "TMT-APS-SE" package, which is under the "09 Views" folder in the Systems Engineering section of the Alignment and Phasing System (APS) work package.

This package contains the APS (Alignment and Phasing System) detailed design documentation (DDD) for the Thirty Meter Telescope project.
